chain.thought: Explanation: On July 29, Gent (a Belgian team) played away against Aalborg and the score was 1-2. Since Gent scored fewer goals than Aalborg, they lost the game.

judge_thought: Explanation: On July 29, the Belgian team was Gent, playing away against Aalborg. The score was 1-2, meaning Gent scored 1 and Aalborg scored 2, so Gent lost the match.
